raw_input: I'm Robert Tran, 54-year-old financial advisor at PNW Financial Advisors—12-person shop in Portland. I've been in this business for 28 years and I'm genuinely worried about AI replacing financial advisors. But I also see clients asking about AI-powered tools, which makes me look outdated if I don't know them. I need something that helps me deliver better analysis (reports are eating my week), protects client data (regulatory nightmare), is easy to learn (I'm not a tech person), helps me understand how to explain AI to clients (career-wise), and honestly, I worry about my kids' future with all this tech. Can Jen help with any of this?

expected_routing.reason: ideal ICP match with all five themes present—high-value prospect addressing career security and productivity needs
